description: Sandbox TD stage windows recomputed from merged raw telemetry.
sql: SELECT name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num_td, fleet_name, pad_name, id AS well_id, api_num, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS stage_start_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS stage_end_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS first_created_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS last_created_ts, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS sample_count, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS avg_rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS max_rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS avg_press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS max_press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS avg_prop_conc_blend_denso, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS max_prop_conc_blend_denso, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS stage_detection_method FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
